headline: Nutanix Targets AI Cloud Growth As Valuation Lags Analyst Expectations
summary: Nutanix (NasdaqGS:NTNX) used its .NEXT conference to unveil Agentic AI, NKP Metal for bare-metal Kubernetes, and expanded multitenant IaaS features. The company introduced new alliances with NetApp and Nerdio aimed at service providers and cloud partners seeking alternatives after the VMware acquisition. The announcements target AI-focused cloud builders and service providers that want flexible, AI-ready infrastructure and tenant isolation. Nutanix is positioning its platform as a potential...
